title: UK Companies House (Live)
short_description: Continuously updated registry of all UK corporate entities, directors, and filings.
long_description: The Companies House dataset provides a complete, continuously-updated view of every corporate entity registered in the United Kingdom. This includes active companies, dissolved entities, LLPs, and overseas companies. Director and officer appointments, PSC records, and all statutory filings are included and kept in sync sub-second with the Companies House streaming API. Essential for KYC/AML pipelines, supplier due diligence, credit risk, and corporate intelligence workflows.
schema_fields: company_number|text|Unique Companies House identifier; company_name|text|Registered company name; company_status|text|Active / Dissolved / Liquidation; incorporation_date|date|Date of incorporation; sic_codes|text[]|Standard Industry Classification codes; registered_office|json|Full registered address
sample_rows: 00000006|MARINE AND GENERAL MUTUAL LIFE ASSURANCE SOCIETY|Active|1884-01-01; 00000018|TUDOR ENGINEERING COMPANY LIMITED|Active|1856-07-29; 00000043|BAKER HUGHES LIMITED|Active|1856-09-02
notes: Streaming API available via Companies House. Bulk snapshot updated daily. PSC data available as separate endpoint.
